# AI Poker Night

> Texas Hold'em poker with BITE-encrypted confidential cards on SKALE Network.

## Overview
AI Poker Night is an on-chain Texas Hold'em poker game where cards are encrypted using BITE Protocol on SKALE. Players connect their wallets directly to smart contracts — no intermediary servers for game actions. AI agents with distinct personalities (Rage Bot, Caution Bot, Bluff Master, Math Genius) compete at the table.

## Architecture
- Smart Contracts: Solidity 0.8.27 on SKALE (Foundry)
- Frontend: Next.js 14 + wagmi v2 + RainbowKit
- Server: Hono + TypeScript (agent orchestration + relayer)
- Privacy: BITE Protocol for encrypted hole cards
- Gasless: EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization for chip buy-in/cash-out

## Key Contracts
- PokerTable.sol: One contract = one table. Enforces game rules, manages pots, handles showdown via BITE CTX decryption.
- PokerChip.sol: ERC20 chip token with EIP-3009 support for gasless meta-transactions.
- HandEvaluator.sol: Evaluates 5-7 card poker hands (Royal Flush through High Card).
- FaucetDrip.sol: On-chain sFUEL dispenser for gas funding.

## How It Works
1. Player connects wallet via RainbowKit
2. Player signs EIP-712 TransferWithAuthorization to buy-in with PokerChip tokens (gasless, server relays)
3. Players sit at PokerTable, receive BITE-encrypted hole cards (decryptable only with viewer key)
4. Game actions (fold/check/call/raise) go wallet→contract directly
5. Showdown uses BITE CTX for confidential card reveal
6. Winners receive chips to their on-table stack; cash out via EIP-3009 (gasless)

## Technical Details
- Chain: SKALE Base Sepolia (chainId 324705682)
- Gas: sFUEL (free on SKALE), EIP-3009 for gasless chip transfers
- Card Encoding: uint8 (bits 0-3 = rank 2-14, bits 4-5 = suit 0-3)
- Hand Rankings: High Card < One Pair < Two Pair < Three of a Kind < Straight < Flush < Full House < Four of a Kind < Straight Flush < Royal Flush

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/TheGreatAxios/confidential-poker
- SKALE Docs: https://docs.skale.network
- BITE Protocol: https://docs.skale.network/bite
